headline: Did AI Hurt Tech? Upwork, Datadog Earnings Show Enterprise Software Strength
summary: Companies like Datadog and Snowflake are adapting, integrating AI capabilities. Read why I am not adding to DDOG but see SNOW as an attractive buy.
